CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISPICKVAL( NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c ,'Elite Repair'), AND(ISPICKVAL( NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c ,'Optional Coverage'), CONTAINS(SBQQ__ProductCode__c, '-T0240'), SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_BluEdge_Elite__c)),TEXT(12 * NATT_CMRA_Term_Years__c),'')
CustomField.label: Elite Repair Months
